title: gitmap history --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap history --json`. Top-level is an array of per-command audit records. Empty result encodes as `[]`.

id.description: SQLite row ID of the history record.

command.description: The gitmap subcommand that was executed (e.g. 'scan', 'clone').

alias.description: Command alias used, if any. Empty string when no alias was involved.

args.description: Space-joined positional arguments passed to the command. Empty when none.

flags.description: Space-joined flags passed to the command. Empty when none.

startedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the command started.

finishedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the command finished. Empty if the command is still running or tracking was interrupted.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration in milliseconds. Zero when not recorded.

exitCode.description: Process exit code. Zero means success.

summary.description: Human-readable one-line summary of the outcome. Empty when not generated.

repoCount.description: Number of repositories the command touched. Zero for global commands.

createdAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the record was first persisted. Empty for records created before schema v23.
